allow: Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('node_modules/qr-code-styling/lib/qr-code-styling.js','utf8'\); const i=s.indexOf\('prototype.update='\); console.log\(s.slice\(i,i+500\)\); const j=s.indexOf\('prototype.append='\); console.log\('---APPEND---'\); console.log\(s.slice\(j,j+500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('node_modules/qr-code-styling/lib/qr-code-styling.js','utf8'\); let i=s.indexOf\('round'\); while\(i!==-1 && i<s.length\){ const seg=s.slice\(i-60,i+120\); if\(/round/.test\(seg\) && /background|Background|borderRadius|rect|min\\\(/.test\(seg\)\){ console.log\('...'+seg.replace\(/\\n/g,' '\)+'...\\n'\); } i=s.indexOf\('round', i+1\); if\(i>200000\) break; }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const x=fs.readFileSync\('dist/favicon.svg','utf8'\);const o=\(x.match\(/<rect/g\)||[]\).length;const op=\(x.match\(/<svg|<g|<defs|<linearGradient|<stop/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('favicon.svg copied to dist:', fs.existsSync\('dist/favicon.svg'\)\);console.log\('rect count:',o,'| structural tags:',op\);console.log\('well-formed:', x.trim\(\).startsWith\('<svg'\) && x.trim\(\).endsWith\('</svg>'\)\);")
